_patch_meta.description: Normalise 18 verse_context rows whose set_aside_reason value falls outside the controlled vocabulary. 17 rows on mti=546 (H2898) Material goods/property → physical_only; 1 row on mti=7497 (H0240) avf_homograph → no_inner_being. patch_type=REPAIR; applicator does not run VCREVISE post-processing — no vc_status flip, no md_version bump. notes field augmented with provenance.

set.notes: Normalised 2026-04-25 — original set_aside_reason was free-text "Material goods/property -- set aside" (pre-VCB-032 vocabulary, predates controlled vocab). Mapped to physical_only per VC instruction v3_8 §3.2: in this verse, H2898 (goodness) refers to material goods/property — physical use, no inner-being engagement.
